global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Discover trending content and shop for new hits.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in lighter shades of blue are scattered across the top, adding visual interest.

elements.label: PulsePlay
elements.description: The word 'PulsePlay' is prominently displayed in bold, black font at the top, conveying a strong brand identity.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: The text 'Watch what's trending' is presented in a clean, white font, emphasizing the ad's focus on current content.

elements.label: New hits message
elements.description: The phrase 'New hits every week' appears below the trending message in a slightly smaller white font, reinforcing the ad's message.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, light blue circle is positioned near the top left, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Small shape
elements.description: A small, dark shape is located towards the bottom center, its purpose is unclear.

elements.label: Medium shape
elements.description: A medium-sized shape in a lighter color is positioned in the center, adding to the abstract design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The bold text 'PulsePlay' stands out prominently against the blue background, capturing attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' is located at the bottom, inviting user interaction.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: Shop now message
elements.description: The text 'Shop now' is displayed in a clear, white font within a button, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern and minimalistic, PulsePlay, trending content, shop now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, with the CTA button at the bottom.
